use_cases: Landing page hero section for creative portfolios and artist showcases
Interactive page introduction with retro-futuristic ASCII art aesthetic
Hero component for media and entertainment platforms seeking unique visual identity
ai_summary: A canvas-based ASCII art hero component featuring animated glitch effects, film grain overlay, and scroll-triggered animations. Uses GSAP ScrollTrigger to create atmospheric color shifts and randomized glitch distortions, delivering a retro-futuristic aesthetic suitable for creative and media industry landing pages.
